source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/05_해외 등록 서류 (영업팀 F-up)/251021 대만 APLUSBIO - P1, 23G/3. NCC/Detector - WIFI Module NCC Certi & Test report/WBW880A_NCC test report 2_4-1-2 WLAN 2.4G測試報告-測試數據.pdf

document.title: 附錄一 受測裝置之測試結果

sourceSummary.oneLine: 受測裝置 WLAN 2.4GHz 測試報告附錄，列出傳導干擾、輻射、頻寬、輸出功率、功率密度及電波暴露量測試數據。
sourceSummary.officialUse: 可作為 WLAN 2.4GHz 模組無線射頻測試數據與法規限值符合性追溯資料。
keyPoints: 報告號碼為 EM-NC190051，案件編號為 C1M1902181。
受測裝置支援 IEEE 802.11b/g/n，測試模式包含 802.11b、802.11g、802.11n-HT20、802.11n-HT40 與接收模式。
測試電壓多處記載為 DC 3.3V，JIG 透過筆記型電腦供電。
發射頻寬、峰值輸出功率、功率密度及電波暴露量均列有限制值與量測值。
電磁波曝露量 MPE 標準值為 1 mW/cm2，送測產品實測值為 0.0179 mW/cm2。

concepts.evidence: 1. 電源線傳導干擾之量測

concepts.name: 其他不必要發射
concepts.evidence: 其他不必要之發射(測至本地振盪頻率之 10 次諧波)

concepts.name: 禁用頻帶量測
concepts.evidence: 2.3. 禁用頻帶量測結果 (其他不必要發射)

concepts.name: 頻帶邊緣之 RF 傳導發射
concepts.evidence: 5. 頻帶邊緣之 RF 傳導發射之量測

concepts.name: 混附發射之 RF 傳導發射

evidence.claim: The appendix is a 74-page test-results appendix for the equipment under test.
evidence.evidenceText: 附錄一 受測裝置之測試結果；附錄一第 1 頁共 74 頁

evidence.claim: The report identifies case number C1M1902181 and report number EM-NC190051.
evidence.evidenceText: 敦吉檢測科技股份有限公司案件編號:C1M1902181 報告號碼:EM-NC190051

evidence.claim: The tested device supports IEEE 802.11b/g/n.
evidence.evidenceText: 支援 IEEE 802.11b/g/n，依測試要求評估低、中、高頻率

evidence.claim: Radiated unwanted emissions were measured up to the tenth harmonic of the local oscillator frequency.
evidence.evidenceText: 對受測物裝置之其他不必要之發射(測至本地振盪頻率之 10 次諧波)

evidence.claim: The worst physical orientation selected for radiated field strength measurement was flat placement.
evidence.evidenceText: 最後選取最大場強值的擺設方式(平放)以低、中、高頻率來進行量測

evidence.claim: Power-line conducted disturbance testing used DC 3.3V through a laptop-connected JIG on 2019/03/13.
evidence.evidenceText: 測試日期 2019/03/13 環境溫/濕度 22℃/58% 測試電壓 DC 3.3V (JIG 透過筆記型電腦)

evidence.claim: Emission bandwidth testing was performed on 2019/03/12 at DC 3.3V with 3.5 dB cable loss.
evidence.evidenceText: 測試日期 2019/03/12 環境溫/濕度 23℃/55% 電纜損失 3.5dB 測試電壓 DC 3.3V

evidence.claim: The 6 dB emission bandwidth limit shown in the report is greater than 500 kHz.
evidence.evidenceText: 模式 測試頻率 (MHz) 6dB 頻寬 (MHz) 限制值 (kHz) ... >500

evidence.claim: The measured 6 dB emission bandwidth values include 8.096 MHz for 802.11b at 2412 MHz and 36.40 MHz for 802.11n-HT40 at 2437 MHz.
Peak output power testing was performed on 2019/03/14 at DC 3.3V with 3.5 dB cable loss.
evidence.evidenceText: 4. 峰值輸出功率之量測 測試日期 2019/03/14 ... 電纜損失 3.5dB 測試電壓 DC 3.3V

evidence.claim: The peak output power limit shown in the report is less than 30 dBm, equivalent to 1 W.
evidence.evidenceText: Limit ... <30dBm (1W)

evidence.claim: The highest total peak output power listed is 16.63 dBm, 0.046026 W, for 802.11n-HT40 at 2437 MHz.
Power spectral density testing was performed on 2019/03/12 at DC 3.3V with 3.5 dB cable loss.
evidence.evidenceText: 7. 功率密度之量測 測試日期 2019/03/12 ... 電纜損失 3.5dB 測試電壓 DC 3.3V

evidence.claim: The power spectral density limit shown in the report is less than 8 dBm per 3 kHz.
evidence.evidenceText: Power Spectral Density (dBm) Limit ... <8 dBm/3kHz

evidence.claim: The highest listed power spectral density is 3.126 dBm for 802.11b at 2472 MHz.
RF exposure measurement used a 20 cm human-body distance.
evidence.evidenceText: 距離人體(r): 20 cm

evidence.claim: The RF exposure calculation used maximum transmit power 16.63 dBm, equivalent to 46.026 mW.
evidence.evidenceText: 最大發射功率(P): 16.63 dBm = 46.026 mW

evidence.claim: The RF exposure calculation used maximum antenna gain 2.9 dBi, equivalent to 1.950 numerical.
evidence.evidenceText: 最大天線增益(G): 2.9 dBi = 1.950 Numerical

evidence.claim: The reported MPE result is 0.0179 mW/cm2.
The report states an MPE standard value of 1 mW/cm2 and a tested product value of 0.0179 mW/cm2.
evidence.evidenceText: 電磁波曝露量MPE標準值1mW/cm2，送測產品實測值為：0.0179 mW/cm2

reviewFlags.reason: Document date is not explicitly present; only test dates are shown.
Product model is not present in the source text; the source path suggests a module name but it was not used as a factual field.
Authority or jurisdiction is ambiguous in the source text; NCC appears in the file path but no explicit authority statement appears in the provided text.
Several later pages appear to contain OCR or extraction layout loss around measurement plots and repeated headers.
Revision or version is not present in the source text.
